text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Did you see the girl who took first?! Mmm-mmm!
The way she gleamed when she crossed the finish
line!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Amazing. That there is maxed-out divinity.
choice_data_list: Next time, I want you taking first!
Next time, I want you taking first!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Amazing. That there is maxed-out divinity.
choice_data_list: Next time, I want you taking first!
Next time, I want you taking first!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
But whatever I achieved is thanks to the
Umamusume! They're the reason why I push
myself.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Like the ones I ran with today. They made me so
emotional! Like, did you see—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, she goes on telling me how charming the
other racers were today.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: I guess I didn't have the heart to be first today...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I need to get my act together and work harder to
do my oshis proud!
